design_philosophy: Authoritative, functional, and data-dense enterprise SaaS. Utilizing stark contrasts, strict grids, and optical clarity. Replacing soft 'SaaS' styles with a brutalist-leaning structural UI that feels like an operational hub.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: F-Pattern scanning for data, modular widgets for actions.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none (sharp edges for technical Swiss look)

components_instructions.table: Shadcn Table. Flat, 1px borders, no outer shadow. Hover states: bg-surface. Include 'select all' checkbox in header. sticky header.
components_instructions.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary: bg-primary_accent text-white hover:bg-primary_hover. Secondary: border-border text-text_main hover:bg-surface.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn Input/Select. Square corners, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary_accent.
components_instructions.sticky_toolbar: Floating bar (z-50) fixed to bottom center of the screen when rows are selected. bg-[#111111] text-white shadow-2xl flex gap-4 p-4 items-center.
components_instructions.badges: Shadcn Badge for rating and status. Square corners.
components_instructions.dialogs: Shadcn Dialog for Email Composer. Sharp corners, backdrop-blur-sm.
components_instructions.tabs: Shadcn Tabs for Profile/Admin. Underline style preferred over pill style.

login_page.left_panel: Flex center, bg-white. Contains brand logo, H1: 'LeadMap / Access', subtext, and Google Login button. Left align content.
login_page.right_panel: Full height image using `login_bg_map`. No text overlay.

dashboard_search.top_section: H1 'Lead Explorer' with a top-right User Profile dropdown.
dashboard_search.map_picker: h-[400px] w-full relative border border-border. Google Map instance. Overlay floating card on top-left for Category Dropdown (Shadcn Select) and 'Search Area' CTA.
dashboard_search.results_section: Displays 'Total Count' badge. Data Table with Sortable headers. Columns: Checkbox, Name, Address, Phone, Email, Rating, Review Count, Hours, Website. Pagination controls (50/page) at top and bottom.
dashboard_search.empty_state: Use `admin_empty_state` image centered with text 'Select a location on the map and choose a category to begin prospecting.'

profile_and_admin.layout: Tabs component for navigation between Profile and Master Admin.
profile_and_admin.profile_tab: Form to set 'Gmail App Password' (Input type password). Status card showing API usage (X/2 sessions).
profile_and_admin.admin_tab: Rendered ONLY for ashkjid@gmail.com. Sub-tabs or stacked sections for: 1. API Keys Management, 2. Data Source Toggle, 3. Per-User Export Permissions Table.

email_composer_modal.layout: Shadcn Dialog. Fixed template text area. Read-only 'To' field showing selected count. 'Send via Gmail' CTA.

login_bg_map.description: High-end abstract topographic map texture, minimal Swiss design style.
login_bg_map.usage: Right side of the split login page.

admin_empty_state.description: Macro photography of organized data blocks, frosted glass.
admin_empty_state.usage: Empty state illustration for tables or when no search is performed.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes using kebab-case role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard icons.
Ensure all components use the sharp, rounded-none style for the Swiss brutalist aesthetic.
Strictly follow the color palette, using the vermilion accent (#FF4F00) sparingly for primary CTAs only.
Implement the sticky toolbar for bulk actions as a floating element that enters the screen when selected row count > 0.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
Table pagination must support 50 items per page with clear top and bottom controls.
Admin routes and features must be strictly conditional based on the master email (ashkjid@gmail.com).
